opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Idaho Heating & Cooling has no online booking, contact form, or CRM tools — phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: Boise-area HVAC customers searching after hours cannot book, sending leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing after-hours appointments directly into a scheduling calendar.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing or CRM tools detected, and no recurring revenue signals on the site.
opportunities.observation: Idaho's harsh winters and hot summers make seasonal tune-ups a natural recurring revenue stream being missed.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance reminders via SMS and email before Boise's summer and winter demand spikes.

opportunities.label: Call Capture Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with zero CRM or tracking tools detected across the entire website.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call in a phone-only business is permanently lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging so every inbound lead is recorded and followed up automatically.
